title: The long journey towards standards for engineering biosystems: Are the Molecular Biology and the Biotech communities ready to standardise?
author_string: Beal, Jacob, Goñi-Moreno, Angel, Myers, Chris, Hecht, Ariel, de Vicente, María Del Carmen et al.
abstract: Synthetic biology needs to adopt sound scientific and industry-like standards in order to achieve its ambitious goals of efficient and accurate engineering of biological systems.
